mapper.select: SELECT om.*, u.username AS user_name, (SELECT oi.item_name FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = om.id LIMIT 1) AS item_name FROM order_main om LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON om.user_id = u.id ORDER BY om.created_at DESC

SELECT om.*, u.username AS user_name, (SELECT oi.item_name FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = om.id LIMIT 1) AS item_name FROM order_main om LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON om.user_id = u.id WHERE om.id = #{id}

SELECT om.*, u.username AS user_name, (SELECT oi.item_name FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = om.id LIMIT 1) AS item_name FROM order_main om LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON om.user_id = u.id WHERE om.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY om.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_main WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PLACED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_main (order_no, user_id, total_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, pickup_method, delivery_name, delivery_phone, delivery_address, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{pickupMethod}, #{deliveryName}, #{deliveryPhone}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{status}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE order_main SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE order_main SET status='PAID', paid_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND status='PLACED'
UPDATE order_main SET status='CANCELLED' WHERE id=#{id} AND status='PLACED'
UPDATE order_main SET status='SHIPPED', shipped_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND status='PAID'
UPDATE order_main SET status='RECEIVED' WHERE id=#{id} AND status='SHIPPED'
UPDATE order_main SET status='COMPLETED', completed_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE order_main SET status='RETURNING', return_reason=#{reason} WHERE id=#{id} AND status='RECEIVED'
UPDATE order_main SET status='REFUNDED', completed_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND status='RETURNING'
